mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post ( user_id, category_id, chat_room_id, post_title, post_content, post_image ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{chatRoomId}, #{postTitle}, #{postContent}, #{postImage} )
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM v_post_list
AND post_title ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND parent_category_id = #{parentCategoryId}
AND category_id = #{categoryId}
AND chat_room_recruit_status = 'RECRUITING'
AND chat_room_recruit_status = 'CLOSED'
AND chat_room_id IS NULL
ORDER BY post_created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM v_post_list WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY post_created_at DESC
